title: Crispy Kale with Glazed Mexican Bake
description: A flavorful and crunchy Indian-inspired side dish that combines crispy kale with a sweet and spicy glazed Mexican bake.
instructions: 2. Rinse the kale and remove stems. Chop into bite-sized pieces.
3. In a large bowl, toss the kale with olive oil and salt until evenly coated.
4. Spread the kale on a baking sheet and roast for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy.
5. While the kale is roasting, prepare the glazed Mexican bake by following the recipe below.
6. To make the glaze, mix together 1/4 cup honey, 1/4 cup lime juice, and 1/4 cup chopped fresh cilantro.
7. Brush the glaze over the Mexican bake during the last 5 minutes of roasting.
8. Remove the kale and Mexican bake from the oven and let cool slightly.
9. Serve the crispy kale with the glazed Mexican bake.
